name: axiom-mcp
description: Read reports, suggest reconciliations, and draft invoices in your Axiom accounting deployment.
long_description: Connects Claude to your Axiom double-entry accounting system. Read-only tools surface contacts, open invoices, AR aging, ledger detail, and standard reports. Write tools are approval-gated — they submit to a per-company approval queue that a human admin approves in the Axiom UI before anything is written. On first use the extension opens your browser to authorize with your Axiom deployment (OAuth + PKCE); tokens are stored locally with file mode 600.

api_url.title: Axiom API URL
api_url.description: Base URL of your Axiom deployment's API, e.g. https://your-axiom.example.com/api

scopes.title: OAuth scopes
scopes.description: Space-separated scopes to request. The default grants read access plus offline refresh.
scopes.default: read:ledger read:invoices read:contacts read:reports read:bank-transactions offline_access

tools.name: explain_ledger_entry
tools.description: Full debit/credit breakdown of a transaction.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Run any of the standard Axiom reports.
